title: Validation report for ada.bbr.metadata.adaProperties.supDocImage - Supplemental Document Image Type

entries.message:
Validation result for _sources/adaProperties/supDocImage/rules.shacl:

  	Source Shape: [ sh:message Literal("A supplemental document image must have a componentType.") ; sh:minCount Literal("1", datatype=xsd:integer) ; sh:path ada:componentType ]
  	Focus Node: [ rdf:type ada:image, schema1:DigitalDocument ]
  	Result Path: ada:componentType
  	Message: A supplemental document image must have a componentType.
